admin.name: Manoj Sunar
admin.title: MERN Developer || Full Stack Developer || CI/CD
admin.bio: I am a MERN stack web developer with 4 months of experience. Completed a 3-month internship at Lumino Technology and 1 months of remote work at Elaric. Skilled in web development, databases, and teamwork.

projects.title: Church Website ( Headless CMS or a Decoupled CMS )
projects.description: Light to the Nations Emanuel Church Platform is a state-of-the-art, fully dynamic web application built to serve as the digital sanctuary for a vibrant faith community. This comprehensive platform empowers church leadership with complete content control while delivering an inspiring, SEO-optimized experience for visitors seeking spiritual growth, community connection, and online giving opportunities.

projects.title: Portfolio Site ( CMS )
projects.description: portfolio is a powerful Headless CMS that seamlessly integrates with a React.js frontend using React Query for efficient server-state management, delivering a smooth and responsive user experience. The system combines dual database persistence between MongoDB and local JSON files, multi-layer caching with Redis and in-memory fallback, and enterprise-grade security featuring two-factor OTP-based password recovery. With hybrid media management supporting both Cloudinary and local storage, the platform enables complete CRUD operations for dynamically managing projects, education records, certificates, about sections, and CV content through a clean service-oriented architecture. The React Query integration ensures automatic data fetching, caching, and background updates, making it a scalable, production-ready solution that empowers administrators to effortlessly update portfolio content while delivering lightning-fast performance to end-users.

education.description: Acquired core competencies in software development lifecycle, web applications, database normalization, algorithms, and computational intelligence.

about.title: Hi, I am Manoj Sunar
about.content: I build web applications that don't just work they empower. As a MERN Stack Developer, I specialize in creating content manageable platforms with intuitive admin panels, secure authentication, and optimized performance. From financial apps to AI platforms, I've delivered production-ready solutions in every project I've touched. My latest creation? A complete church management system where non-technical staff can manage sermons, events, and ministries effortlessly. I believe technology should serve people, not complicate their lives.

items.title: Portfolio ( CMS )
items.subtitle: Personal
items.description: Built a full-stack portfolio CMS with React.js frontend and Node.js backend, featuring dual database persistence with MongoDB and local JSON storage, multi-layer Redis caching, OTP-based two-factor authentication, hybrid Cloudinary/local media management, and complete CRUD operations for dynamic content management with React Query for seamless server-state synchronization
items.skills: ( React + Vite ) , Node JS, Javascript, Typescript, Redis, MongoDB Atlas, React Query, Cloudinery
items.highlights:
. Dual database persistence with automatic MongoDB and local JSON file synchronization, plus intelligent failover.
 Multi-layer caching with Redis and in-memory fallback, featuring pattern-based instant cache invalidation.
Two-factor password recovery with OTP verification via email for enterprise-grade security.
Complete Headless CMS with full CRUD operations for managing projects, education, certificates, about sections, and CV/resume content dynamically.
